mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation (user_id, vehicle_id, parking_lot_id, parking_space_id, start_time, end_time, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{vehicleId}, #{parkingLotId}, #{parkingSpaceId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE reservation SET user_id = #{userId}, vehicle_id = #{vehicleId}, parking_lot_id = #{parkingLotId}, parking_space_id = #{parkingSpaceId}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, vehicle_id, parking_lot_id, parking_space_id, start_time, end_time, status, created_at, updated_at FROM reservation
